title: Japan, May 2025
description: Chasing the quiet rustle of bamboo groves and the endless glow of neon nights in early summer.

photos.caption: Yakiniku Rikimaru in Osaka — the best yakiniku I've ever had.

photo.caption: Captured this at Osaka Castle: a miniature army from the Sengoku era. The detail is insane!

blocks.quote: Old world charm meets a very modern appetite.
blocks.body: Kyoto was all about the slow walks and ancient views, but Osaka is a whole different beast. From exploring the massive castle grounds to getting lost in the crowds at Dotonbori, the vibe here is unmatched. It’s good to see these historical spots in person rather than just in books :)

photos.caption: Togetsukyo Bridge, where the moon gracefully crosses.

photo.caption: Standing on the centuries-old stage of Kiyomizu-dera, taking in the breathtaking view of Kyoto.

blocks.body: Kyoto asked nothing of us except to notice. We obliged — slowly, and with a wandering spirit that took us from the quiet river banks to the heart of the city noise.

photos.caption: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove is a natural bamboo forest in Kyoto.
